name: Cranberry Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 orange, washed, quartered and seeded, coarsely ground
1 one-inch knob of fresh ginger, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. If using a food processor, process orange chunks for 20 to 30 seconds; add quartered onion and process just until coarsely chopped.
2. Combine the mixture with remaining ingredients in a heavy saucepan. Bring to a boil; lower heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 25 to 30 minutes.
3. Flavor will improve after aging for a day or two.
